§lScroll of Homeward Bound§r
§8ITEM§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Epic
•§lTrade by§r: Scrollwright
•§lCraftable§r: NO
•§lStackable§r: 64
•§lDispensable§r: NO
•§lOffhand equippable§r: YES
•§lCastable with§r: Wands
•§lCast Result§r: Teleports the reader to their set spawn point.

§lScroll of Displacement I§r
§8ITEM§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lCraftable on§r: Magic Spells Table
•§lStackable§r: 64
•§lDispensable§r: YES
•§lOffhand equippable§r: YES
•§lCastable with§r: Wands
•§lImpact Hit Damage§r: 2

•§lImpact Area Damage§r: 0
•§lImpact Effect§r: Teleports all mobs within a 4-block radius to a random area within a 12-block radius of their original location.
